steps.title: Use complementary acute angles
steps.content: In a right triangle, the two acute angles add to $90^\circ$. Since angles $X$ and $Y$ are the acute angles, they are complementary.

steps.title: Apply the cofunction identity
steps.content: For complementary angles, the sine of one acute angle equals the cosine of the other.$$\sin X=\cos Y$$The answer is A.
